covered_top_50.description: EPIC: Architecture Consolidation - Shared Infrastructure Layer | 3 phases, 27 tasks, 24h total | P0-P2 priorities
1.1.1: Set up PostgreSQL AGE test environment | Duration: 45m | Complexity: 0.6 | Energy: Medium
1.1.2: Run concurrent operations stress test | Duration: 30m | Complexity: 0.6 | Energy: Medium | Depends: 1.1.1
1.1.3: Validate AGE/PG compatibility | Duration: 45m | Complexity: 0.6 | Energy: Medium | Depends: 1.1.2
1.2.1: Analyze Context Integration layer | Duration: 30m | Complexity: 0.5 | Energy: Medium
1.2.2: Build config generator | 2h | Complexity: 0.8 | Profile → Claude config.json, preserve non-MCP settings
1.2.2: Document architecture decision | Duration: 30m | Complexity: 0.5 | Energy: Medium | Depends: 1.2.1
1.3.1: Create dopemux-core package structure | Duration: 60m | Complexity: 0.7 | Energy: High
1.3.1: Enhance dopemux start command | 1.5h | Complexity: 0.6 | Add --profile flag, default to 'full', error handling
1.3.2: Add dopemux profile list | 0.5h | Complexity: 0.4 | Discover profiles, display name, description, MCP count
1.3.2: Extract VoyageEmbedder & QdrantClient singletons | Duration: 60m | Complexity: 0.7 | Energy: High | Depends: 1.3.1
1.3.3: Add dopemux profile show | 0.5h | Complexity: 0.4 | Display full profile details, pretty-print YAML
1.3.3: Create ADHDConfigService wrapper | Duration: 60m | Complexity: 0.7 | Energy: High | Depends: 1.3.1
1.3.4: Add dopemux profile validate | 0.5h | Complexity: 0.5 | Validate profile, test config generation dry-run
1.3.4: Write unit tests for dopemux-core | Duration: 60m | Complexity: 0.7 | Energy: High | Depends: 1.3.2, 1.3.3
2.1.1: Git branch pattern matcher | 1.5h | Complexity: 0.5 | Use gitpython, support wildcards, 30 points if match
2.1.1: Remove ConPort semantic_search MCP tool | Duration: 30m | Complexity: 0.4 | Energy: Low-Medium | Depends: 1.3.4
2.1.2: Directory pattern analyzer | 1h | Complexity: 0.4 | Match pwd against patterns, 25 points if match
2.1.2: Update docs & add deprecation warnings | Duration: 30m | Complexity: 0.4 | Energy: Low-Medium | Depends: 2.1.1
2.1.4: Time window checker | 1h | Complexity: 0.4 | Parse HH:MM-HH:MM format, 15 points if in window
2.2.1: Remove ConPort embedding_service, import from core | Duration: 30m | Complexity: 0.6 | Energy: Medium-High | Depends: 1.3.2
2.2.1: Scoring algorithm implementation | 1.5h | Complexity: 0.7 | Sum signals, calculate confidence (total/100)
2.2.2: Suggestion strategy logic | 1h | Complexity: 0.5 | >0.85=gentle, 0.65-0.85=explain, <0.65=skip
2.2.2: Write & run migration script (re-embed decisions) | Duration: 45m | Complexity: 0.6 | Energy: Medium-High | Depends: 2.2.1
2.2.3: Fallback hierarchy | 1h | Complexity: 0.5 | ADHD Engine optional, git optional, manual override wins
2.2.3: Validate embedding quality & schema | Duration: 45m | Complexity: 0.6 | Energy: Medium-High | Depends: 2.2.2
2.3.1: Refactor Serena ADHD to use ADHDConfigService | Duration: 60m | Complexity: 0.7 | Energy: High | Depends: 1.3.3
2.3.1: dopemux profile suggest command | 1h | Complexity: 0.5 | Run detection, show top 3 matches with scores
2.3.2: Enhance dopemux start with --auto-detect | 1h | Complexity: 0.5 | Run detection if flag present, gentle prompt if >0.85
2.3.2: Refactor dope-context ADHD to use ADHDConfigService | Duration: 60m | Complexity: 0.7 | Energy: High | Depends: 1.3.3
2.3.3: Refactor ConPort ADHD to use ADHDConfigService | Duration: 60m | Complexity: 0.7 | Energy: High | Depends: 1.3.3
3.1.1: Design & populate conport_integration_links | Duration: 60m | Complexity: 0.8 | Energy: Very High | Depends: 2.2.3
3.1.1: Design session schema | 1h | Complexity: 0.6 | Category: profile_sessions, fields: session_id, profile_from/to, context_snapshot
3.1.2: Implement bidirectional linking logic | Duration: 60m | Complexity: 0.8 | Energy: Very High | Depends: 3.1.1
3.1.2: Implement session save | 1.5h | Complexity: 0.7 | Collect open files, cursor, decisions, call log_custom_data
3.1.3: Create trace_decision_to_code MCP tool | Duration: 60m | Complexity: 0.8 | Energy: Very High | Depends: 3.1.2
3.1.3: Implement session restore | 1.5h | Complexity: 0.7 | Query ConPort, extract context, return SessionContext object
3.1.4: Fallback handling | 1h | Complexity: 0.6 | ConPort unavailable -> warn but continue, graceful degradation
3.1.4: Write integration tests for knowledge graph | Duration: 60m | Complexity: 0.8 | Energy: Very High | Depends: 3.1.3
3.1.5: Validate graph traversal performance | Duration: 60m | Complexity: 0.8 | Energy: Very High | Depends: 3.1.4
3.1.6: Document knowledge graph usage | Duration: 60m | Complexity: 0.8 | Energy: Very High | Depends: 3.1.5
3.2.1: Claude process detection | 1h | Complexity: 0.6 | Use psutil, find by process name, handle multiple instances
3.2.1: Integrate dope-context in Serena, add Find Similar command | Duration: 60m | Complexity: 0.6 | Energy: Medium-High | Depends: 2.1.2, 2.3.1
3.2.2: Graceful shutdown | 1.5h | Complexity: 0.8 | SIGTERM (3s timeout), SIGKILL if needed, verify termination
3.2.2: Test semantic similarity & ADHD disclosure | Duration: 60m | Complexity: 0.6 | Energy: Medium-High | Depends: 3.2.1
4.1.2: Enhance statusline display | 1h | Complexity: 0.4 | Add [DEVELOPER] | MED | FOCUS, color coding (green=matched, yellow=custom)
4.6.3: Polish & UX improvements | 1h | Complexity: 0.4 | Better error messages, progress indicators, confirmations, help text
Day 11-12: Slack Client Setup (8-10 hours)
Day 13: Slack Status Management (4-5 hours)
Day 14-15: Message Triage System (10-12 hours)
